references.name: Roadtrippers
references.takeaway: Scatter organic bean-shaped and squiggle decorations around content blocks as neon-sign ornaments, and present content items as a numbered itinerary sequence suggesting a road-trip route from stop to stop.

implementation.description: Bean-shaped organic border decoration with accent2 color and rotation, placed at top-right of each view header as a neon-sign ornament
Squiggle/ellipse decoration at bottom-left with accent color as secondary neon-sign ornament
Content presented as a numbered itinerary sequence: DEPARTURE -> EN ROUTE -> REST STOP -> DESTINATION, suggesting a road-trip route progression from stop to stop
cssProperties: Sequential column ordering with color-coded headers

implementation.description: Plate numbers like RT66-001 through RT66-009 create a numbered sequence through the kanban, evoking an itinerary order

references.name: The Neon Museum Las Vegas
references.takeaway: Set the entire page on a deep black background and render all headlines with neon-glow text-shadow effects (0 0 10px, 0 0 40px in the accent color), so each heading reads like a lit tube-letter motel sign against the night sky.

implementation.description: Deep dark background (#1a1a1e) that makes neon-colored elements glow with maximum contrast and luminosity
All primary headings use multi-layer neon text-shadow with 10px, 30px, and 60px radii for realistic tube-letter glow effect
Secondary headings use pink neon glow treatment for variety, like different colored neon signs in the museum boneyard
Accent elements rendered as neon signs with glow halos, treating each value as a vintage sign specimen
cssProperties: animation: neon-flicker for aging tube effect

implementation.description: Logo split into teal and pink neon tube colors like a dual-color vintage motel sign

references.name: El Cosmico Marfa
references.takeaway: Style content cards as vintage postcards with rounded 16px corners, warm tan borders, and a slight drop-shadow rotation (1-2 degrees) so they feel like physical cards scattered on a motel lobby counter.

implementation.description: Project cards styled as vintage postcards with rounded 16px corners and warm scene backgrounds, hover removes rotation for 'picking up' effect
Idea cards styled as polaroid photos with varied CSS custom property rotation (-3deg to +2.5deg), creating a scattered-on-counter feeling
Kanban cards evoke physical license plates with embossed state headers and plate numbers, continuing the tactile card-on-surface metaphor
Town headers styled like physical road signs with green background and retroreflective side borders, evoking real-world directional signage
